findings.evidence: `UniformEllipticity.lean:52` sets `[DecidableEq n]`; `UniformEllipticity.lean:67` omits it for `matrixBilinearForm`, while `UniformEllipticity.lean:81` and `:101` do not. Mathlib `Matrix.toBilin'_apply'` is available under `[Fintype n]`, whereas `Matrix.toQuadraticForm'` is the nearby API that requires `[DecidableEq n]`.
findings.fix: Add `omit [DecidableEq n] in` to the DecEq-free bilinear-form lemmas, at least `matrixBilinearForm_apply` and `norm_matrixBilinearForm_le_of_upper_bound`; keep `[DecidableEq n]` only for identity/quadratic-form statements that need it.
findings.issue: `matrixBilinearForm_apply` and the bound lemma at line 101 inherit the global `[DecidableEq n]`, although these statements only use the finite-index bilinear/mulVec API and the definition already omits `[DecidableEq n]`.

summary: The new API is at the right Euclidean matrix level for the PDE roadmap, but two bilinear-form lemmas inherit an unnecessary decidable-equality assumption from the file-level context.
